purpose: Personal coaching and research for improving AI-assisted software development workflow.

scoring_model.principle: Score the fit between the AI-assisted workflow and the task shape, not the amount of ceremony performed.

applicability.core: The dimension was essential for this task shape.
applicability.important: The dimension mattered normally for this task shape.
applicability.optional: The dimension was useful but lightweight evidence was enough.
applicability.not_applicable: The dimension did not meaningfully apply to this task.

verification_guidance.small_low_risk_docs: Review the rendered text, links, and consistency; heavy planning or unit tests are usually not required.
verification_guidance.script_or_tooling: Run syntax checks and at least one fixture, sample, or dry run when possible.
verification_guidance.app_code: Run focused tests, type/lint checks, or manual scenario checks appropriate to the change.
verification_guidance.high_risk_change: Expect explicit plan, stronger verification, rollback thinking, and clear developer ownership.
